displayText.headline: Sinking Cushion Fatigue?
displayText.subheading: Say goodbye to sagging sofa frames
displayText.footer: Trade in your old furniture for value.

style: commercial product photography minimalist modern Marble Pedestal style
description: Creative concept detail: Marble Pedestal visual layout style. A luxurious white marble platform rests in the center of the frame, elevating the detailed bed frame. Text is perfectly centered above the product, creating a classical architectural focal point that screams stability.
